name: Doom-paw Doppia
bio: world_eater (atk=14 hp=42, ON_BATTLE_START ×2 + ON_ATTACK) eats the field whole. worldroot_colossus (def=14 hp=42) walls the answer-shots. crypt_wraith epic + nullhound + echo_lich + moss_titan round out the cross-element bruiser core. Designed for total board control — no individual unit gets to live.
